expo.name: RamaVerse
expo._comment_targetSdk: Android targetSdkVersion is controlled by the Expo SDK/config-plugin version, not set directly here. Expo SDK 52 targets Android 15 / API 35 by default. DO NOT hand-edit targetSdkVersion in android/build.gradle unless ejected. Before every Play Store upload run: `npx expo config --type public` and check the generated android/build.gradle (after `npx expo prebuild`) for compileSdkVersion/targetSdkVersion >= 35. Only bump to API 36 once `expo-doctor` and EAS Build report no incompatible native modules.
